creator: frederic.praca@free.fr
text:
Hi,
I just tested your patch against revision 347005 and have the following
problem :
[...]
===>   Registering installation for cups-client-1.7.0
pkg-static:
lstat(/usr/ports/print/cups-client/work/stage/usr/local/include/cups/adminutil.h):
No such file or directory
[... and so on for other headers]

When looking for these files, I found them here :
root@coruscant:/usr/ports/print/cups-client # find . -name adminutil.h
./work/cups-1.7.0/cups/adminutil.h
./work/stage/usr/ports/print/cups-client/work/stage/usr/local/include/cups/adminutil.h

As I don't have any staging skill, I was not really able to find what
was going wrong.

Fred
